title: Sonnet 5 (Fully Tested): IT UNDERPERFORMS GLM-5.2 and COSTS MORE!?
summary: AICodeKing reviews Anthropic's Sonnet 5 model and concludes it underperforms relative to Opus and GLM-5.2 while costing more. The review highlights benchmark limitations, poor real-world coding performance, and strange behavior in coding tools. The creator judges Sonnet 5 as overpriced and less useful than alternatives.
writeup: This video reviews Anthropic's Sonnet 5, with AICodeKing concluding that the model underperforms both Opus and GLM-5.2 while costing more. The review points to benchmark limitations, weak real-world coding results, and odd behavior inside coding tools. The verdict: Sonnet 5 is overpriced and less useful than available alternatives.
